title: cymbopogon goeringii
intro: Cymbopogon goeringii, also known as East Indian lemongrass, is a tropical grass species native to the Eastern Himalayas and Southeast Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Cymbopogon goeringii include reducing anxiety and stress, improving digestion, and relieving symptoms of colds and fever, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, essential oils, and tinctures for various health remedies.
